Guide d'implémentation FR Core - version de développement local (intégration continue v2.2.0) construite par les outils de publication FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard). Voir le répertoire des versions publiées

Resource Profile: FR Core Immunization Profile

Official URL: https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-immunization Version: 2.2.0
Active as of 2026-06-22 Computable Name: FRCoreImmunizationProfile

FRCoreImmunizationProfile permet de décrire l’administration d’un vaccin.

  • Il permet également de décrire pourquoi un vaccin n’a pas été réalisé.
  • Ce profil hérite de la structuration, des contraintes et des vocabulaires définis dans le profil FRMedicationAdministrationDocument sauf mentions précisées ci-après.

Utilisations:

  • Ce Profil n'est utilisé par aucun autre profil dans ce guide d'implémentation

Vous pouvez également vérifier les usages dans le FHIR IG Statistics

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Key Elements Table
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All

Constraints: ext-1

URL: https://profiles.ihe.net/PHARM/MPD/StructureDefinition/ihe-ext-medication-productname

URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/5.0/StructureDefinition/extension-Immunization.basedOn
Constraints: ext-1

Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
url 1..1 uri "http://hl7.org/fhir/5.0/StructureDefinition/extension-Immunization.basedOn"
value[x] 1..1 Reference(MedicationRequest) Authority that the immunization event is based on
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
Constraints: ext-1
status ?!Σ 1..1 code Immunization status.
Binding: ImmunizationStatusCodes (required): A set of codes indicating the current status of an Immunization.
vaccineCode Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Vaccin. Code du produit de santé
Binding: VaccinesUvIps (1.1.0) (preferred): The type of vaccine for particular disease or diseases against which the patient has been immunised, or a code for absent/unknown immunization.
Bindings AdditionnelsButDocumentation
VaccinesWhoAtcUvIps (1.1.0) Préféré
For when WHO ATC code system is preferred
eHDSI Vaccine Préféré
For EU cross-border use
Slices pour coding Σ 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:system
coding:cis Σ 1..1 Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Binding: FRCoreValueSetVaccineCodeCIS (2.2.0) (required)
coding:translation Σ 0..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Binding: FRCoreValueSetMedicationTranslation (2.2.0) (required)
system Σ 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
patient Σ 1..1 Reference(Patient (EU core)(2.0.0)) Who was immunized
Slices pour occurrence[x] Σ 1..1 dateTime Date de la vaccination
Slice: Non ordonné, Fermé par type:$this
occurrence[x]:occurrenceDateTime Σ 0..1 dateTime Vaccine administration date
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:periodOfLife 0..1 (Complexe) Many: Periods of Life
URL: http://hl7.eu/fhir/extensions/StructureDefinition/periods-of-life
Constraints: ext-1
extension 0..0 Extension
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
url 1..1 uri "http://hl7.eu/fhir/extensions/StructureDefinition/periods-of-life"
lotNumber 0..1 string Numéro de lot.
expirationDate 0..1 date Date d'expiration du produit
site 0..1 CodeableConcept Région anatomique d'administration
Binding: JdvImmunizationApproachSiteCodeCisis (20260420150249) (required)
route 0..1 CodeableConcept Voie d'administration
Binding: JdvImmunizationRouteCodeCisis (20260420150250) (required)
doseQuantity 0..1 SimpleQuantity(4.0.1) Dose administrée
Slices pour performer Σ 0..* BackboneElement Who performed event
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:$this.function
performer:Toutes les slices Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
actor Σ 1..1 Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Organization) Individual or organization who was performing
performer:administeringCentreOrHp Σ 0..* BackboneElement Administering centre
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
function Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept What type of performance was done
Binding: ImmunizationFunctionCodes (extensible): The role a practitioner or organization plays in the immunization event.
Motif requis: Au moins les éléments suivants
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valeur fixe : (Complexe)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Valeur fixe : http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0443
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Valeur fixe : AP
display 0..1 string Representation defined by the system
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
actor Σ 1..1 Reference(Organization (EU core)(2.0.0) | PractitionerRole (EU core)(2.0.0) | Practitioner (EU core)(2.0.0)) Individual or organization who was performing
note Σ 0..1 Annotation Commentaire
text Σ 1..1 markdown Additional notes about the immunization
reasonReference 0..* Reference(Condition) Réaction observée suite au vaccin
isSubpotent ?!Σ 0..1 boolean Dose potency

Documentation pour ce format

Bindings terminologiques

Chemin Statut Usage Jeu de valeurs (ValueSet) Version Source
Immunization.status Base required Immunization Status Codes 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR
Immunization.vaccineCode Base preferred Vaccines - IPS 📍1.1.0 International Patient Summary Implementation Guide v1.1
Immunization.vaccineCode.​coding:cis Base required FR Core ValueSet Vaccine code CIS 📍2.2.0 cet IG
Immunization.vaccineCode.​coding:translation Base required FR Core ValueSet Medication translation 📍2.2.0 cet IG
Immunization.site Base required JDV Immunization Approach Site Code CISIS 📍20260420150249 Terminologies de Santé v1.10
Immunization.route Base required JDV Immunization Route Code CISIS 📍20260420150250 Terminologies de Santé v1.10
Immunization.performer:administeringCentreOrHp.​function Base extensible Immunization Function Codes 📍4.0.1 Std. FHIR

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique Immunization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error Immunization.implicitRules, Immunization.extension, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension:_datatype, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension:_datatype.value[x], Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension:concept, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension:reference, Immunization.extension:informationSource, Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension, Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension:_datatype, Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension:_datatype.value[x], Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension:concept, Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension:reference, Immunization.extension:productName, Immunization.extension:basedOnRequestR5, Immunization.extension:basedOnRequestR5.value[x], Immunization.modifierExtension, Immunization.status, Immunization.vaccineCode, Immunization.vaccineCode.coding, Immunization.vaccineCode.coding:cis, Immunization.vaccineCode.coding:translation, Immunization.vaccineCode.coding:translation.system, Immunization.patient, Immunization.occurrence[x], Immunization.occurrence[x]:occurrenceDateTime, Immunization.occurrence[x]:occurrenceDateTime.extension:periodOfLife, Immunization.lotNumber, Immunization.expirationDate, Immunization.site, Immunization.route, Immunization.doseQuantity, Immunization.performer, Immunization.performer.modifierExtension, Immunization.performer.actor, Immunization.performer:administeringCentreOrHp, Immunization.performer:administeringCentreOrHp.modifierExtension, Immunization.performer:administeringCentreOrHp.function, Immunization.performer:administeringCentreOrHp.actor, Immunization.note, Immunization.note.text, Immunization.reasonReference, Immunization.isSubpotent All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error Immunization.extension, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension:_datatype, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension:concept, Immunization.extension:administeredProduct.extension:reference, Immunization.extension:informationSource, Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension, Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension:_datatype, Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension:concept, Immunization.extension:informationSource.extension:reference, Immunization.extension:productName, Immunization.extension:basedOnRequestR5, Immunization.modifierExtension, Immunization.occurrence[x]:occurrenceDateTime.extension:periodOfLife, Immunization.performer.modifierExtension, Immunization.performer:administeringCentreOrHp.modifierExtension Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

author[x] Σ 0..1 Individual responsible for the annotation
authorReference Reference(Practitioner | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization)
authorString string
time Σ 0..1 dateTime When the annotation was made
text Σ 1..1 markdown Additional notes about the immunization
reasonCode 0..* CodeableConcept Reasons for the administration.
Binding: ImmunizationReasonCodes (example): The reason why a vaccine was administered.
reasonReference 0..* Reference(Condition) Réaction observée suite au vaccin
isSubpotent ?!Σ 0..1 boolean Dose potency
subpotentReason 0..* CodeableConcept Reason for being subpotent
Binding: ImmunizationSubpotentReason (example): The reason why a dose is considered to be subpotent.
education C 0..* BackboneElement Educational material presented to patient
Constraints: imm-1
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
documentType 0..1 string Educational material document identifier
reference 0..1 uri Educational material reference pointer
publicationDate 0..1 dateTime Educational material publication date
presentationDate 0..1 dateTime Educational material presentation date
programEligibility 0..* CodeableConcept Patient eligibility for a vaccination program
Binding: ImmunizationProgramEligibility (example): The patient's eligibility for a vaccation program.
fundingSource 0..1 CodeableConcept Funding source for the vaccine
Binding: ImmunizationFundingSource (example): The source of funding used to purchase the vaccine administered.
reaction 0..* BackboneElement Details of a reaction that follows immunization
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
date 0..1 dateTime When reaction started
detail 0..1 Reference(Observation) Additional information on reaction
reported 0..1 boolean Indicates self-reported reaction
protocolApplied 0..* BackboneElement Protocol followed by the provider
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
series 0..1 string Name of vaccine series
Binding: ActSubstanceAdministrationImmunizationCode (20260420150251) (required)
authority 0..1 Reference(Organization) Who is responsible for publishing the recommendations
targetDisease 0..* CodeableConcept Vaccine preventatable disease being targetted
Binding: VaccineTargetDiseasesUvIps (1.1.0) (preferred): The diseases against which the patient has been immunised
Bindings AdditionnelsButDocumentation
eHDSI Illness and Disorder Préféré
For when WHO ATC code system is preferred

Slices pour doseNumber[x] 1..1 Dose Number
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par type:$this
doseNumberPositiveInt positiveInt
doseNumberString string
doseNumber[x]:doseNumberPositiveInt 0..1 positiveInt Rang de la vaccination
seriesDoses[x] 0..1 Number of doses
seriesDosesPositiveInt positiveInt
seriesDosesString string

dom-3 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()

dom-5 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique Immunization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()

This structure is derived from ImmunizationEuCore

Résumé

Obligatoire : 4 éléments(2 éléments obligatoire(s) imbriqué(s))
Interdit : 1 élément

Structures

Cette structure fait référence à ces autres structures:

  • MedicationRequest (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest|4.0.1)
  • Condition (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Condition|4.0.1)

Extensions

Cette structure fait référence à ces extensions:

  • https://profiles.ihe.net/PHARM/MPD/StructureDefinition/ihe-ext-medication-productname|1.0.0-comment-2
  • http://hl7.org/fhir/5.0/StructureDefinition/extension-Immunization.basedOn|0.1.0

Slices

Cette structure définit les slices suivantes:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Immunization.vaccineCode.coding
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Immunization.protocolApplied.doseNumber[x]

Constraints: ext-1
status ?!Σ 1..1 code Immunization status.
Binding: ImmunizationStatusCodes (required): A set of codes indicating the current status of an Immunization.
vaccineCode Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Vaccin. Code du produit de santé
Binding: VaccinesUvIps (1.1.0) (preferred): The type of vaccine for particular disease or diseases against which the patient has been immunised, or a code for absent/unknown immunization.
Bindings AdditionnelsButDocumentation
VaccinesWhoAtcUvIps (1.1.0) Préféré
For when WHO ATC code system is preferred
eHDSI Vaccine Préféré
For EU cross-border use

Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:system

coding:translation Σ 0..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Binding: FRCoreValueSetMedicationTranslation (2.2.0) (required)
system Σ 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
patient Σ 1..1 Reference(Patient (EU core)(2.0.0)) Who was immunized
Slices pour occurrence[x] Σ 1..1 dateTime Date de la vaccination

Binding: JdvImmunizationApproachSiteCodeCisis (20260420150249) (required)
route 0..1 CodeableConcept Voie d'administration

Slices pour performer Σ 0..* BackboneElement Who performed event

modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized

Constraints: ext-1
function Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept What type of performance was done
Binding: ImmunizationFunctionCodes (extensible): The role a practitioner or organization plays in the immunization event.
Motif requis: Au moins les éléments suivants
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system

Valeur fixe : http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0443
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant

Valeur fixe : AP
display 0..1 string Representation defined by the system
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
actor Σ 1..1 Reference(Organization (EU core)(2.0.0) | PractitionerRole (EU core)(2.0.0) | Practitioner (EU core)(2.0.0)) Individual or organization who was performing
note Σ 0..1 Annotation Commentaire
text Σ 1..1 markdown Additional notes about the immunization
reasonReference 0..* Reference(Condition) Réaction observée suite au vaccin
isSubpotent ?!Σ 0..1 boolean Dose potency

url 1..1 uri "http://hl7.org/fhir/5.0/StructureDefinition/extension-Immunization.basedOn"
value[x] 1..1 Reference(MedicationRequest) Authority that the immunization event is based on
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
Constraints: ext-1
identifier 0..* Identifier Identifier of the immunization
status ?!Σ 1..1 code Immunization status.
Binding: ImmunizationStatusCodes (required): A set of codes indicating the current status of an Immunization.
statusReason 0..1 CodeableConcept Reason for not performing.
Binding: ImmunizationStatusReasonCodes (example): The reason why a vaccine was not administered.
vaccineCode Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Vaccin. Code du produit de santé
Binding: VaccinesUvIps (1.1.0) (preferred): The type of vaccine for particular disease or diseases against which the patient has been immunised, or a code for absent/unknown immunization.
Bindings AdditionnelsButDocumentation
VaccinesWhoAtcUvIps (1.1.0) Préféré
For when WHO ATC code system is preferred
eHDSI Vaccine Préféré
For EU cross-border use
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
Slices pour coding Σ 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:system
coding:cis Σ 1..1 Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Binding: FRCoreValueSetVaccineCodeCIS (2.2.0) (required)
coding:translation Σ 0..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Binding: FRCoreValueSetMedicationTranslation (2.2.0) (required)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
system Σ 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
version Σ 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code Σ 0..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
display Σ 0..1 string Representation defined by the system
userSelected Σ 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text Σ 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
patient Σ 1..1 Reference(Patient (EU core)(2.0.0)) Who was immunized
encounter 0..1 Reference(Encounter) Encounter immunization was part of
Slices pour occurrence[x] Σ 1..1 dateTime Date de la vaccination
Slice: Non ordonné, Fermé par type:$this
occurrence[x]:occurrenceDateTime Σ 0..1 dateTime Vaccine administration date
id 0..1 string xml:id (or equivalent in JSON)
Slices pour extension 0..* Extension Extension
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
Slices pour extension Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
extension:periodOfLife 0..1 (Complexe) Many: Periods of Life
URL: http://hl7.eu/fhir/extensions/StructureDefinition/periods-of-life
Constraints: ext-1
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..0 Extension
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
url 1..1 uri "http://hl7.eu/fhir/extensions/StructureDefinition/periods-of-life"
value[x] 0..1 CodeableConcept Value of extension
Binding: PeriodsOfLifeEuVs (2.0.0) (preferred)
value 0..1 dateTime Primitive value for dateTime
recorded 0..1 dateTime When the immunization was first captured in the subject's record
primarySource Σ 0..1 boolean Indicates context the data was recorded in
reportOrigin 0..1 CodeableConcept Indicates the source of a secondarily reported record
Binding: ImmunizationOriginCodes (example): The source of the data for a record which is not from a primary source.
location 0..1 Reference(Location (EU core)(2.0.0)) Where immunization occurred
manufacturer 0..1 Reference(Organization) Vaccine manufacturer/MAH
lotNumber 0..1 string Numéro de lot.
expirationDate 0..1 date Date d'expiration du produit
site 0..1 CodeableConcept Région anatomique d'administration
Binding: JdvImmunizationApproachSiteCodeCisis (20260420150249) (required)
route 0..1 CodeableConcept Voie d'administration
Binding: JdvImmunizationRouteCodeCisis (20260420150250) (required)
doseQuantity 0..1 SimpleQuantity(4.0.1) Dose administrée
Slices pour performer Σ 0..* BackboneElement Who performed event
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:$this.function
performer:Toutes les slices Contenu/Règles pour toutes les slices
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
function Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept What type of performance was done
Binding: ImmunizationFunctionCodes (extensible): The role a practitioner or organization plays in the immunization event.
actor Σ 1..1 Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Organization) Individual or organization who was performing
performer:administeringCentreOrHp Σ 0..* BackboneElement Administering centre
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
function Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept What type of performance was done
Binding: ImmunizationFunctionCodes (extensible): The role a practitioner or organization plays in the immunization event.
Motif requis: Au moins les éléments suivants
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valeur fixe : (Complexe)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Valeur fixe : http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0443
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Valeur fixe : AP
display 0..1 string Representation defined by the system
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
actor Σ 1..1 Reference(Organization (EU core)(2.0.0) | PractitionerRole (EU core)(2.0.0) | Practitioner (EU core)(2.0.0)) Individual or organization who was performing
note Σ 0..1 Annotation Commentaire
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par value:url
Constraints: ext-1
author[x] Σ 0..1 Individual responsible for the annotation
authorReference Reference(Practitioner | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization)
authorString string
time Σ 0..1 dateTime When the annotation was made
text Σ 1..1 markdown Additional notes about the immunization
reasonCode 0..* CodeableConcept Reasons for the administration.
Binding: ImmunizationReasonCodes (example): The reason why a vaccine was administered.
reasonReference 0..* Reference(Condition) Réaction observée suite au vaccin
isSubpotent ?!Σ 0..1 boolean Dose potency
subpotentReason 0..* CodeableConcept Reason for being subpotent
Binding: ImmunizationSubpotentReason (example): The reason why a dose is considered to be subpotent.
education C 0..* BackboneElement Educational material presented to patient
Constraints: imm-1
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
documentType 0..1 string Educational material document identifier
reference 0..1 uri Educational material reference pointer
publicationDate 0..1 dateTime Educational material publication date
presentationDate 0..1 dateTime Educational material presentation date
programEligibility 0..* CodeableConcept Patient eligibility for a vaccination program
Binding: ImmunizationProgramEligibility (example): The patient's eligibility for a vaccation program.
fundingSource 0..1 CodeableConcept Funding source for the vaccine
Binding: ImmunizationFundingSource (example): The source of funding used to purchase the vaccine administered.
reaction 0..* BackboneElement Details of a reaction that follows immunization
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
date 0..1 dateTime When reaction started
detail 0..1 Reference(Observation) Additional information on reaction
reported 0..1 boolean Indicates self-reported reaction
protocolApplied 0..* BackboneElement Protocol followed by the provider
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
Constraints: ext-1
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
Constraints: ext-1
series 0..1 string Name of vaccine series
Binding: ActSubstanceAdministrationImmunizationCode (20260420150251) (required)
authority 0..1 Reference(Organization) Who is responsible for publishing the recommendations
targetDisease 0..* CodeableConcept Vaccine preventatable disease being targetted
Binding: VaccineTargetDiseasesUvIps (1.1.0) (preferred): The diseases against which the patient has been immunised
Bindings AdditionnelsButDocumentation
eHDSI Illness and Disorder Préféré
For when WHO ATC code system is preferred

Slice: Non ordonné, Ouvert par type:$this
doseNumberPositiveInt positiveInt
doseNumberString string
doseNumber[x]:doseNumberPositiveInt 0..1 positiveInt Rang de la vaccination
seriesDoses[x] 0..1 Number of doses
seriesDosesPositiveInt positiveInt
seriesDosesString string

Chemin Statut Usage Jeu de valeurs (ValueSet) Version Source

Immunization.vaccineCode.​coding:translation Base required FR Core ValueSet Medication translation 📍2.2.0 cet IG

Contraintes

Id Grade Chemin(s) Description Expression
dom-2 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Immunization If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Immunization If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 bonne pratique Immunization A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()

This structure is derived from ImmunizationEuCore

Résumé

Obligatoire : 4 éléments(2 éléments obligatoire(s) imbriqué(s))
Interdit : 1 élément

Structures

Cette structure fait référence à ces autres structures:

  • MedicationRequest (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/MedicationRequest|4.0.1)
  • Condition (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Condition|4.0.1)

Extensions

Cette structure fait référence à ces extensions:

  • https://profiles.ihe.net/PHARM/MPD/StructureDefinition/ihe-ext-medication-productname|1.0.0-comment-2
  • http://hl7.org/fhir/5.0/StructureDefinition/extension-Immunization.basedOn|0.1.0

Slices

Cette structure définit les slices suivantes:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Immunization.vaccineCode.coding
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Immunization.protocolApplied.doseNumber[x]

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron
